title: FiveSeasonStuff 6 Real Touch Long Stems Artificial White Calla Lily Flowers & Bouquet, for Home Shop Office Restaurant Wedding Party Décor/DIY Flower Arrangement Decoration, 64cm (25.2 inches)
features: Fill your slim and tall vases with these brilliant and innocent FiveSeasonStuff Artificial Calla Lilies, which will make your home full of vigour and vitality. Consisting of 6 long single stems of calla lilies with delicate design and vibrant colour. All stems are bendable and adjustable

Perfect for wedding bouquets, bridals, buttonholes, parties, home (windowsill, dining table, coffee table, foyer, living room, etc.), holidays, gifts, centrepieces, restaurants, shops, special occasions, office décor, DIY
4 bright colours to choose from. Size: height: 64cm (25.2 inches), diameter of flower head: 7cm (2.8 inches)
Material: flowers - premium PU (Polyurethane); stems - plastic and wires
Package Contents: 1 bouquet consisting of 6 stems of artificial white calla lilies, sealed in FiveSeasonStuff branded packaging
description: Product description FiveSeasonStuff Real Touch Artificial Calla Lily Flowers & Bouquet Calla lilies are popular garden plants with captivating and attractive appearance, unique arrow-shaped flower head and wonderful colour range. They are native to South Africa and easy to cultivate Calla Lilies usually blossom during spring and early summer. However, they blossom only 8 weeks after planting Want these beautiful flowers to thrive all the year round? Try these realistic and elegant FiveSeasonStuff Artificial Calla Lilies! For your decoration, we have produced 3 typical colours of callas - white, purple, and yellow, which are lifelike with real touch petals. These artificial calla lilies will stay fresh throughout the year to lighten up your home These lovely bouquet comprises 6 single stems. Detailed yellow stamens and exquisite petals make the flowers look natural and gorgeous The stems are long, sturdy and straight, yet bendable. Stems are flexible for all types of uses since they can be adjusted to any shape You can tie these flowers together for decoration, as bridal bouquets or gifts For larger bouquet, recommend two or more bouquets for vases or centrepieces Please Note: Due to the long stems, it is normal that the stems are folded when they come out from the packaging. Please unfold them for straightening Please Note: Due to different colour monitors, the colour from the actual flowers and from the actual photo on your monitor may vary White flowers will oxidise over time when exposed to all environmental factors Package Contents: 1 bouquet consisting of 6 stems of artificial white calla lilies, sealed in FiveSeasonStuff branded packaging Safety Warning This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions in some individuals. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets.
